message:
fix: increase QueryTokenList SmallVec capacity from 4 to 8

The query_token_list_handles_operators test expected a 5-token query
("foo AND bar OR baz") to stay on the stack, but SmallVec<[QueryToken; 4]>
spills at 5 elements. Increasing to 8 matches realistic boolean query
sizes and fixes the test on macOS. Updated the spill test to use 9 tokens
accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
